title: Automate login and verify each main page loads correctly in OrangeHRM after successful authentication

scenarios.title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: OrangeHRM demo site is accessible at https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/

steps.action: Navigate to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login
steps.expected: Login page loads, username and password fields are visible

steps.action: Enter 'Admin' in the username field
steps.expected: Username field contains 'Admin'

steps.action: Enter 'admin123' in the password field
steps.expected: Password field is populated (masked)

steps.action: Click the Login button
steps.expected: Authentication succeeds, user is redirected to dashboard URL

steps.action: Verify dashboard page has loaded
steps.expected: URL contains '/dashboard/index', page title or heading confirms dashboard view

edge_cases: Login form shows validation error for empty credentials
Page does not hang — login completes within 30s timeout

scenarios.title: Verify Dashboard (home) page loads after login

steps.action: Navigate to dashboard via sidebar or URL /web/index.php/dashboard/index
steps.expected: Dashboard page is active

steps.action: Assert dashboard header or widget container is visible
steps.expected: At least one dashboard widget or heading element is visible on screen

edge_cases: Dashboard shows 'Time at Work' or similar widgets — assert any widget present

scenarios.title: Verify Admin page loads
preconditions: User is logged in as Admin

steps.action: Click 'Admin' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Admin page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/admin/viewSystemUsers'

steps.action: Assert the 'User Management' heading or table is visible
steps.expected: Admin page content (User Management section) is displayed

edge_cases: Non-admin users would not see this menu — test runs as Admin so it should always be visible

scenarios.title: Verify PIM page loads

steps.action: Click 'PIM' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: PIM page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/pim/viewEmployeeList'

steps.action: Assert the Employee List heading or table is visible
steps.expected: PIM employee list grid is displayed

edge_cases: Employee list may be empty in demo — assert heading, not row count

steps.action: Click 'Leave' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Leave page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/leave'

steps.action: Assert Leave list heading or filter panel is visible
steps.expected: Leave module content is rendered correctly

steps.action: Click 'Time' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Time page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/time'

steps.action: Assert Time module heading or timesheet table is visible
steps.expected: Time module renders without error

steps.action: Click 'Recruitment' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Recruitment page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/recruitment'

steps.action: Assert vacancy list or Recruitment heading is visible
steps.expected: Recruitment module renders without error

steps.action: Click 'My Info' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: My Info page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/pim/viewMyDetails'

steps.action: Assert personal details form or employee name heading is visible
steps.expected: My Info page shows the current user's profile form

steps.action: Click 'Performance' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Performance page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/performance'

steps.action: Assert KPI or Manage Reviews heading is visible
steps.expected: Performance module renders without error

scenarios.title: Verify Directory page loads

steps.action: Click 'Directory' in the left sidebar navigation menu
steps.expected: Directory page is active, URL contains '/web/index.php/directory'

steps.action: Assert employee directory cards or search panel is visible
steps.expected: Directory module renders without error

edge_cases: Directory may show zero results in demo — assert the search/filter panel, not the card count

pom_pages_needed.name: DashboardPage
responsibilities: Assert dashboard heading or widget is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: SidebarNav
responsibilities: Click named menu item by text label
Wait for navigation to settle after click
Return current active page URL for assertion

pom_pages_needed.name: AdminPage
responsibilities: Assert User Management heading is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: PimPage
responsibilities: Assert Employee List heading or table is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: LeavePage
responsibilities: Assert Leave module heading or panel is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: TimePage
responsibilities: Assert Time module heading or timesheet is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: RecruitmentPage
responsibilities: Assert Recruitment heading or vacancy list is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: MyInfoPage
responsibilities: Assert personal details form or user name is visible
Confirm URL matches My Info path

pom_pages_needed.name: PerformancePage
responsibilities: Assert Performance module heading is visible

pom_pages_needed.name: DirectoryPage
responsibilities: Assert Directory search panel or card container is visible

helpers_needed.name: loginAs
helpers_needed.description: Perform full login flow: navigate to login page, fill credentials, click login, wait for dashboard URL. Accepts username and password as parameters.

helpers_needed.name: navigateToModule
helpers_needed.description: Click a named sidebar menu item and wait for the resulting page URL to stabilize. Returns the final URL for assertion. Accepts menu label string.

helpers_needed.name: assertPageLoaded
helpers_needed.description: Generic assertion that a given URL pattern is present in the current page URL and a key heading or container selector is visible. Accepts url substring and selector.

selector_strategy.primary: css [data-v-*] or input[name='username'] — OrangeHRM Vue app uses name attributes and class-based selectors; prefer name attributes and aria-labels as stable anchors
selector_strategy.secondary: CSS class selectors scoped to component containers where name/aria unavailable
selector_strategy.navigation: text-based: page.getByRole('link', { name: 'Admin' }) or page.getByText() for sidebar items
notes: OrangeHRM demo does not use data-testid attributes — rely on input[name], role selectors, and visible text
Sidebar nav items can be selected via getByRole('link', { name }) — most stable across versions
Page headings confirm module load — use getByRole('heading') with expected text
After sidebar click, wait for URL change with page.waitForURL() before asserting content

selection_reasoning: playwright-typescript was explicitly provided via FRAMEWORK_OVERRIDE. It is well-suited for this UI navigation test: TypeScript strict typing enables safe POM class composition, Playwright's waitForURL() and getByRole() APIs handle SPA navigation reliably, and the serial test mode matches the sequential login-then-navigate flow required by this ticket.
